# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security updates are provided for the latest published release and the current `main` branch.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| Latest release | Yes |
| `main` | Yes |
| Older releases | No |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please do not open a public issue.

Use GitHub's private vulnerability reporting for this repository if the "Report a vulnerability" option is available:

https://github.com/chentao1006/FluxMonitor/security/advisories/new

If private reporting is not available, contact the maintainer through GitHub:

https://github.com/chentao1006

Please include:

- A clear description of the issue and its impact.
- Steps to reproduce or a proof of concept.
- The affected version, environment, and any relevant logs or screenshots.

You can expect an initial response within 7 days. After the issue is confirmed, a fix will be prepared and released as soon as practical.
